THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUMP SHOT SPORTSWEAR INC. IS PERMANENTLY ENJOINED FROM OFFERING ANY VINYL/PVC EARPHONE CORDS CONTAINING DI(2-ETHYLHEXYL)PHTHALATE (DEHP) IN CALIFORNIA WITHOUT PROVIDING CLEAR AND REASONABLE WARNINGS REGARDING THE RISKS OF BIRTH DEFECTS OR OTHER REPRODUCTIVE HARM CAUSED BY DEHP EXPOSURES, AS REQUIRED BY HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 25249.7(A). THIS INCLUDES BUT IS NOT LIMITED TO THE FOLLOWING PRODUCTS: DESIGN BY PRESTIGEX WALLET CASE WITH EARPHONES. #1399104, UPC #6 78091 17259 5. STATUTORY DAMAGES: $5,000.00; ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS: $38,812.44; TOTAL JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $43,812.44. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

Notice Of Motion For Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Jun-28-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Leslie C. Nichols, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Christpher F. Tuttle, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, RUSSELL BRIMER,
Order Granting Waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant JUMP SHOT SPORTSWEAR INC.,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Jump Shot Sportswear Inc. is permanently enjoined from offering any vinyl/PVC earphone cords containing Di(2-ethylhexyl)phthalate (DEHP) in California without providing clear and reasonable warnings regarding the risks of birth defects or other reproductive harm caused by DEHP exposures, as required by Health and Safety Code section 25249.7(a). This includes but is not limited to the following products:
Design by Prestigex Wallet Case with Earphones. #1399104, UPC #6 78091 17259 5.

Statutory Damages: $5,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees and costs: $38,812.44
Total Judgment in the amount of $43,812.44

Judgment signed in open court.
